env HOME=${WORK}

[linux] env XDG_CONFIG_HOME=${HOME}/.config
[linux] env XDG_RUNTIME_DIR=${HOME}/runtime
[linux] mkdir ${XDG_CONFIG_HOME}/dex
[linux] mkdir ${XDG_RUNTIME_DIR}
[linux] mv config.toml ${HOME}/.config/dex/config.toml

[darwin] mkdir ${HOME}'/Library/Application Support/dex'
[darwin] mv config.toml ${HOME}'/Library/Application Support/dex/config.toml'

env GOBIN=${WORK}/bin
env PATH=${GOBIN}:${PATH}
cd ${PKG_ROOT}
# This can be any module.
go install ./cmd/runner
cd ${WORK}

dex -log debug -lines &
sleep 1s
kill -INT
wait
stderr '"msg":"invalid config"'
stderr '"service\.dummy\.serial: 2 errors in empty disjunction: \(and 3 more errors\)"'

-- config.toml --
[kernel]
device = []
network = "tcp"

[module.runner]
path = "runner"
log_mode = "log"
log_level = "debug"
log_add_source = true

[service.dummy]
module = "runner"
# Validation fails since serial is not in kernel.device (device = []).
serial = ""
